# webcpu-agent-skill

> All-agent skill/plugin for precise CPU-rendered Canvas2D 3D scenes with `@xsyetopz/easel` EASEL.js.

Baseline package: `@xsyetopz/easel@0.4.5`.
Canonical source: `source/skills/webcpu-easel/`.
Generated outputs: `.build/generated/`, `.build/llms/`, and `dist/`.
Agent rule: do not invent APIs; answer `UNKNOWN` when references and installed declarations do not verify a requested symbol or behavior.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): build, runtime support, Claude plugin marketplace install, agent prompts, install outputs, and grounding contract.
- [Agent instructions](AGENTS.md): canonical repository-wide AI agent rules.
- [Agent platform matrix](docs/agent-platforms.md): generated support table for Codex, Claude, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini, Zed, JetBrains, Cline, Roo, Augment, Amp, Neovim, and Antigravity.
- [Contributing guide](CONTRIBUTING.md): contributor workflow, validation, generated-surface rules, and public-doc guardrails.
- [Skill contract](source/skills/webcpu-easel/body.md): execution protocol, anti-rules, runtime decision table.
- [Reference map](source/skills/webcpu-easel/REFERENCE.md): lookup order, examples, templates, references.

## API References

- [API index](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/api-index.md): verified exports from `@xsyetopz/easel@0.4.5`.
- [Class signatures](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/class-signatures.md): constructor, method, and property shapes.
- [Enums and constants](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/enums-constants.md): exported constants and literal values.
- [Module imports](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/module-imports.md): npm, Bun, JSR, Deno, ESM, and CommonJS imports.
- [Deno runtime](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/deno-runtime.md): Deno-managed browser app constraints and commands.

## Recipes

- [Setup](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/setup.md): first validation path.
- [Renderer/framebuffer](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/renderer-framebuffer.md): renderer, framebuffer, and Canvas2D upload.
- [Render loops](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/render-loop-recipes.md): animation frames, resize, profiling.
- [Manual geometry](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/geometry-manual.md): positions, normals, UVs, indices.
- [Materials](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/materials.md): material choices, side, opacity, shading.
- [Textures/assets](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/textures-assets.md): textures, atlases, `DataTexture`.
- [Input/picking](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/input-picking.md): pointer scaling, `Raycaster`, voxel DDA.
- [Voxel worlds](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/voxel-worlds.md): chunk meshing and rebuild budgets.
- [Performance](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/performance.md): CPU renderer optimization checklist.

## Agent Instructions

- [Claude Code instructions](CLAUDE.md): generated Claude-specific wrapper importing `AGENTS.md`.
- [Gemini CLI instructions](GEMINI.md): generated Gemini wrapper importing `AGENTS.md`.
- [GitHub Copilot instructions](.github/copilot-instructions.md): generated Copilot repository guidance.
- [Cursor rule](.cursor/rules/webcpu-easel.mdc): generated Cursor always-apply project rule.
- [Zed rules](.rules): generated Zed project rule.
- [JetBrains AI Assistant rule](.aiassistant/rules/webcpu-easel.md): generated JetBrains project rule.
- [JetBrains Junie instructions](.junie/AGENTS.md): generated Junie-preferred `AGENTS.md`.
- [Cline rule](.clinerules/00-webcpu-easel.md): generated Cline workspace rule.
- [Roo Code rule](.roo/rules/00-webcpu-easel.md): generated Roo Code workspace rule.
- [Augment rule](.augment/rules/webcpu-easel.md): generated Augment workspace rule.

## Templates

- [Vite vanilla TypeScript](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/vite-vanilla-ts): minimal browser bundler starter.
- [React canvas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/react-canvas): React canvas mount starter.
- [Astro canvas](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/astro-canvas): Astro page with EASEL scene.
- [Voxel world starter](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/voxel-world-starter): chunk meshing starter.
- [Deno browser](source/skills/webcpu-easel/templates/deno-browser): Deno-managed browser app starter.

## Optional

- [Version provenance](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/version-provenance.md): upstream package and docs links.
- [Package identity](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/package-identity.md): EASEL.js naming boundaries.
- [THREE.js migration](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/threejs-migration.md): concept mapping from THREE.js.
- [CreateJS comparison](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/createjs-easeljs-comparison.md): boundary against CreateJS EaselJS.
- [WebGL/WebGPU comparison](source/skills/webcpu-easel/reference/webgl-webgpu-comparison.md): backend capability matrix.
- [llms full manifest](llms-full.txt): complete LLM manifest with every reference, example, template, and script.
